Root___Healthy.remedy: No disease or pest detected. Continue current organic farming and irrigation practices.
Root___Healthy.prevention: Maintain soil health by adding compost and monitoring moisture weekly.

Root___Rot.remedy: Apply a bio-fungicide containing Trichoderma harzianum or copper-based fungicide to suppress root-rotting pathogens.
Root___Rot.dosage: Trichoderma formulation: 5 g per liter of water as a root drench. Copper fungicide: 2 g per liter.
Root___Rot.prevention: Ensure proper field drainage, avoid overhead or excessive irrigation, and rotate crops with non-susceptible varieties.

Root___Knot_Nematodes.remedy: Drench soil with neem cake extract or apply biological nematicides containing Paecilomyces lilacinus to control root-knot nematode populations.
Root___Knot_Nematodes.dosage: Neem cake: 100 g per square meter mixed into the soil. Biopesticide: 5 ml per liter, drench root zones.
Root___Knot_Nematodes.prevention: Grow marigolds as a trap crop, practice solarization during summer, and rotate with cereal crops.

Root___Woolly_Aphids.remedy: Apply systemic insecticides or drench with entomopathogenic fungi like Beauveria bassiana to target root-feeding aphid colonies.
Root___Woolly_Aphids.dosage: Beauveria bassiana: 3 ml per liter of water, applied thoroughly to the exposed root zone.
Root___Woolly_Aphids.prevention: Scout root crowns of adjacent crops, use aphid-resistant rootstocks, and control ant populations which farm aphids.

Root___Nitrogen_Deficiency.remedy: Apply a quick-release nitrogen fertilizer such as urea, or organic options like blood meal or liquid fish emulsion.
Root___Nitrogen_Deficiency.dosage: Urea: 10 g per plant, dissolved in water and applied at the base. Organic emulsion: 15 ml per liter.
Root___Nitrogen_Deficiency.prevention: Plant nitrogen-fixing cover crops (legumes like clover or alfalfa) and maintain high organic matter levels.

Root___Phosphorus_Deficiency.remedy: Incorporate rock phosphate, bone meal, or superphosphate (SSP) close to the root zone to promote strong root development.
Root___Phosphorus_Deficiency.dosage: Bone meal: 50 g per plant mixed into the root-zone soil. Superphosphate: 5 g per plant.
Root___Phosphorus_Deficiency.prevention: Maintain soil pH in the optimal range (6.0 - 7.0) to prevent phosphorus lock-up, and inoculate soil with mycorrhizal fungi.

Root___Potassium_Deficiency.remedy: Apply potassium-rich fertilizers such as muriate of potash (MOP), sulfate of potash (SOP), or organic wood ash.
Root___Potassium_Deficiency.dosage: Muriate of Potash: 8 g per plant drench. Wood ash: 100 g mixed into soil surface.
Root___Potassium_Deficiency.prevention: Conduct regular soil tests, avoid over-leaching sandy soils, and recycle crop residues back into the field.

Soil___Healthy_Humus.remedy: Excellent microbial activity and soil structure. No corrective action required.
Soil___Healthy_Humus.prevention: Continue cover cropping, low-till practices, and regular additions of well-rotted animal manure or compost.

Soil___Compacted.remedy: Perform mechanical aeration (deep ripping) to break compacted layers and apply gypsum to clay soils to improve aeration.
Soil___Compacted.dosage: Gypsum: 500 g per square meter, worked into the top 10 cm of soil.
Soil___Compacted.prevention: Reduce heavy machinery traffic, avoid farming when soil is wet, and grow deep taproot crops like tillage radishes.

Soil___Salinity_Crust.remedy: Flush the soil root zone with high-quality, low-salt water to leach soluble salts below the root level. Apply agricultural sulfur.
Soil___Salinity_Crust.dosage: Sulfur: 50 g per square meter to lower pH and displace sodium if calcium is present.
Soil___Salinity_Crust.prevention: Improve subsurface drainage, avoid saline irrigation water, and use organic mulches to reduce evaporation-driven salt accumulation.

Soil___Erosion_Sandy.remedy: Add massive amounts of compost, green manure, and mulches to build soil cohesion, water-holding capacity, and nutrient retention.
Soil___Erosion_Sandy.dosage: Compost: 5 to 10 kg per square meter, mixed into the topsoil.
Soil___Erosion_Sandy.prevention: Keep soil covered with living vegetation or mulches at all times, implement windbreaks, and practice zero-tillage.
